/usr/bin/ar qc lib/libsemba-main.a "CMakeFiles/semba-main.dir/src_main_pub/semba_fdtd.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-main.dir/src_main_pub/calc_constants.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-main.dir/src_main_pub/nfde_rotate.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-main.dir/src_main_pub/EpsMuTimeScale.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-main.dir/src_main_pub/getargs.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-main.dir/src_main_pub/healer.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-main.dir/src_main_pub/preprocess_geom.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-main.dir/src_main_pub/storegeom.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-main.dir/src_main_pub/version.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-main.dir/src_main_pub/postprocess.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-main.dir/src_main_pub/interpreta_switches.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-main.dir/src_main_pub/resuming.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-main.dir/src_main_pub/timestepping.F90.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib lib/libsemba-main.a
